seoTitle: Lavelle vs Lawes — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lavelle and Lawes. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lavelle and Lawes.
heading: Lavelle vs Lawes — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lavelle, Queensland and Lawes, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lawes has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Lavelle (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lavelle or Lawes safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lavelle has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Lawes scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lavelle scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Lawes scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lavelle or Lawes?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lawes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
